headline: Celsius Holdings Acquisition Of Alani Nu Puts Valuation Gap In Focus
summary: Celsius Holdings (NasdaqCM:CELH) has acquired Alani Nu, a fast growing fitness and lifestyle energy brand. The company is integrating Alani Nu into PepsiCo’s distribution network to reach more convenience and retail channels. The deal targets new consumer demographics and aims to widen Celsius Holdings' overall energy drink footprint. Celsius Holdings, trading at $41.51, sits at an interesting point after a 26.1% return over the past year and a very large 5 year gain of 186.3%. Shorter term...
